text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: That's right, Big Brother... I am!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: That's right, Big Sister... I am!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
I didn't do well in the last race... so I'm going to
try even harder this time.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
...U-um, would you mind cheering me on a bit
more... vigorously this time?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
...U-um, would you mind cheering me on a bit
more... vigorously this time?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: If you do, I think I can do even better!
